member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.DigitalGaugeCharacterType
member.summary: Represents the types of digital characters that can be displayed in various segments within a digital gauge.

member.summary: Characters are designed to display numbers in a seven-segment format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.DigitalGaugeCharacterType.FourteenSegment
member.summary: Characters are designed to display both alphabets and numbers in a fourteen-segment format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.DigitalGaugeCharacterType.SixteenSegment
member.summary: Characters are designed to display both alphabets and numbers in a sixteen-segment format.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.DigitalGaugeCharacterType.EightCrossEightDotMatrix
member.summary: Characters are designed to display special characters, along with alphabets and numbers, in an eight-by-eight dot matrix format.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfDigitalGauge
member.summary: The digital gauge control is used to display alphanumeric characters in digital (LED display) mode. This control displays a range of values that uses characters in combination with numbers.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to initialize the control. # [XAML](#tab/tabid-1)
<DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge x:Name="DigitalGauge" Text = "1234" /> </DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-2)
this.DigitalGauge.Text = "1234";
member.summary: The digital gauge control is used to display alphanumeric characters in digital (LED display) mode. This control displays a range of values that uses characters in combination with numbers.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfDigitalGauge.TextProperty
member.summary: Identifies the dependency property.

member.summary: Identifies the dependency property.

member.summary: Identifies the dependency property.

member.summary: Identifies the dependency property.

member.summary: Identifies the dependency property.

member.summary: Identifies the dependency property.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfDigitalGauge.TextChanged
member.summary: Occurs whenever the text value is changed.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfDigitalGauge.Text
member.summary: Gets or sets the display text of the digital gauge. This property specifies the text to be displayed within the gauge.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the Text property in the digital gauge #[XAML](#tab/tabid-3)
<DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge x:Name="DigitalGauge" Text = "1234" /> </DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-4)
this.DigitalGauge.Text = "1234";

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfDigitalGauge.CharacterType
member.summary: Gets or sets the character type of the digital gauge.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the CharacterType property in the digital gauge #[XAML](#tab/tabid-5)
<DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge x:Name="DigitalGauge" CharacterType = "FourteenSegment" /> </DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-6)
this.DigitalGauge.CharacterType = CharacterType.SevenSegment;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfDigitalGauge.CharacterWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the character width of the digital gauge. This property customizes the width of each character in the gauge.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the CharacterWidth property in the digital gauge #[XAML](#tab/tabid-7)
<DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge x:Name="DigitalGauge" CharacterWidth = "50" /> </DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-8)
this.DigitalGauge.CharacterWidth = 50;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfDigitalGauge.CharacterHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the character height of the digital gauge. This property customizes the height of each character in the gauge.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the CharacterHeight property in the digital gauge #[XAML](#tab/tabid-9)
<DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge x:Name="DigitalGauge" CharacterHeight = "70" /> </DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-10)
this.DigitalGauge.CharacterHeight = 70;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfDigitalGauge.CharacterSpacing
member.summary: Gets or sets the character spacing of the digital gauge. This property specifies the spacing between characters in the gauge.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the CharacterSpacing property in the digital gauge #[XAML](#tab/tabid-11)
<DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge x:Name="DigitalGauge" CharacterSpacing = "10" /> </DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-12)
this.DigitalGauge.CharacterSpacing = 10;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfDigitalGauge.StrokeWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the segment stroke width of the digital gauge. This property customizes the stroke width of each segment in the gauge.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the StrokeWidth property in the digital gauge #[XAML](#tab/tabid-13)
<DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge x:Name="DigitalGauge" StrokeWidth = "8" /> </DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-14)
this.DigitalGauge.StrokeWidth = 8;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfDigitalGauge.CharacterStroke
member.summary: Gets or sets the character stroke color of the digital gauge.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the CharacterStroke property in the digital gauge #[XAML](#tab/tabid-15)
<DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge x:Name="DigitalGauge" CharacterStroke = "Orange" /> </DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-16)
this.DigitalGauge.CharacterStroke = Colors.Orange;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfDigitalGauge.DisabledSegmentStroke
member.summary: Gets or sets the disabled segment color of the digital gauge.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the DisabledSegmentStroke property in the digital gauge #[XAML](#tab/tabid-17)
<DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge x:Name="DigitalGauge" DisabledSegmentStroke="Gray" /> </DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-18)
this.DigitalGauge.DisabledSegmentStroke = Colors.Gray;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfDigitalGauge.DisabledSegmentAlpha
member.summary: Gets or sets the disabled segment alpha of the digital gauge. This property customizes the transparency of disabled segments in the gauge.
member.remarks: The minimum value is 0, and maximum value is 1.
member.example:
The following code demonstrates, how to use the DisabledSegmentAlpha property in the digital gauge #[XAML](#tab/tabid-19)
<DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge x:Name="DigitalGauge" DisabledSegmentAlpha = "0.5f" /> </DigitalGauge:SfDigitalGauge>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-20)
this.DigitalGauge.DisabledSegmentAlpha = 0.5f;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.BarPointer.Offset
member.summary: Gets or sets the value to adjusts the position from the axis line to the custom position.
member.remarks: Specifies the distance between the pointer and the scale line. rendered over the scale line by default.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.BarPointer.PointerSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the height of for a horizontal linear gauge, or to the width of for a vertical linear gauge.
member.value: The size of the , in pixels. The default value is 4.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.BarPointer.CornerStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets a enumeration value that describes the corner/edge style of the .
member.value: A value of the enumeration. The default is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.BarPointer.GradientStops
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of that specifies how interior is painted with gradient brush on the .
member.value: A collection of the objects associated with the brush, each of which specifies a color and an offset along the scale. The default is an empty collection.

example.code: <gauge:SfLinearGauge> <gauge:SfLinearGauge.BarPointers> <gauge:BarPointer Position="Outside" Offset="5" CornerStyle="BothCurve" Value="70"> <gauge:BarPointer.GradientStops> <gauge:GaugeGradientStop Value="0" Color="Green"/> <gauge:GaugeGradientStop Value="35" Color="#ff0074E3"/> </gauge:BarPointer.GradientStops> </gauge:BarPointer> </gauge:SfLinearGauge.BarPointers> </gauge:SfLinearGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.BarPointer.Fill
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates the brush used to paint the pointer interior.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.BarPointer.Child
member.summary: Gets or sets the child content of a .

example.code: <gauge:SfLinearGauge> <gauge:SfLinearGauge.BarPointers> <gauge:BarPointer Value="50" Position="Outside" PointerSize="50" Offset="10" CornerStyle="BothCurve"> <gauge:BarPointer.Child> <Label Text="Bar pointer" TextColor="White" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center"/> </gauge:BarPointer.Child> </gauge:BarPointer> </gauge:SfLinearGauge.BarPointers> </gauge:SfLinearGauge>

member.value: true if animation is enabled; otherwise, false.The default value is false.
member.remarks: EnableAnimation decides whether the pointer will be animated or not while its value get changed. If EnableAnimation is true, then it will be animated, otherwise not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.LinearPointer.IsInteractive
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the pointer accepts changing its Value through interaction.
member.value: true if pointer interaction is enabled; otherwise, false.The default value is false.
member.remarks: It decides whether the gauge pointer will be interactive or not. If is true, the gauge pointer will be interactive, otherwise not.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge
member.summary: Creates a linear gauge control to displays the values on a linear scale horizontally or vertically. It has a rich set of features such as axis, ranges, and pointers that are fully customizable and extendable.

example.code: <gauge:SfLinearGauge > <gauge:SfLinearGauge.Ranges> <gauge:LinearRange/> </gauge:SfLinearGauge.Ranges> <gauge:SfLinearGauge.MarkerPointers> <gauge:LinearShapePointer Value="70" /> <gauge:LinearContentPointer Value="80" > <gauge:LinearContentPointer.Content> <Grid WidthRequest="30" HeightRequest="25"> <RoundRectangle Stroke="Black" StrokeThickness="2" CornerRadius="5"/> <Label Text = "70" TextColor="Black" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center"/> </Grid> </gauge:LinearContentPointer.Content> </gauge:LinearContentPointer> </gauge:SfLinearGauge.MarkerPointers> <gauge:SfLinearGauge.BarPointers> <gauge:BarPointer Value="60" /> </gauge:SfLinearGauge.BarPointers> </gauge:SfLinearGauge>

member.summary: Called when an axis label is created

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.Minimum
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum value of the axis. The axis starts from this value.
member.value: It defines the minimum values of the . The default value is 0.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.Maximum
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum value of the axis. The axis ends at this value.
member.value: It defines the maximum value of the . The default value is 100.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.Interval
member.summary: Gets or sets the interval value of the axis. Using this, the axis labels and major ticks can be displayed after a certain interval value.
member.value: It defines the interval of the . The default value is double.NaN.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.MinorTicksPerInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the minor ticks count per interval in an axis..
member.value: It defines the number of minor ticks will be rendered between the major ticks. The default value is 1.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.MaximumLabelsCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of labels to be displayed in 100 logical pixels.
member.value: Maximum number of labels to be displayed in a axis in 100 logical pixels. Its default value is 3.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.LabelFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets a value to formats the scale labels with globalized string formats.
member.value: The string that specifies the globalized string formats for the scale labels. Its default value is string.Empty.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.LabelPosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates the position of the scale labels inside or outside the axis line.
member.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies the position of labels in the linear gauge. The registered default vlaue is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.LabelOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets a value to adjusts the axis label position from tick end to the custom position. Specify values in the logical pixel.
member.value: It defines the offset of the axis labels. The default value is double.NaN.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.TickPosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates the position of the ticks inside, or center, or outside the axis line.
member.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies the position of ticks in the linear gauge. The default is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.TickOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the value to adjusts the scale ticks position from the scale line to the custom position. Specify values in the logical pixels.
member.value: It defines the offset of the ticks. The default value is double.NaN.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.LineStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets a value to customize the style of default axis line.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.LabelStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets a value to customize the style of default axis labels.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.MajorTickStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets a value to customize the style of default major ticks.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.MinorTickStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets a value to customize the style of default minor ticks.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.IsMirrored
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to mirror the linear gauge.
member.value: true if scale is mirrored; otherwise, false.The default value is false.
member.remarks: decides whether the linear gauge elements will be rendered in the opposite direction.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.IsInversed
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether inverts the axis from right to left for a horizontal linear gauge or top to bottom for a vertical linear gauge.
member.value: true if axis is inversed; otherwise, false.The default value is false.
member.remarks: decides whether the axis will be inversed or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.ShowTicks
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show or hide the axis ticks.
member.value: true if axis ticks lines are displayed; otherwise, false.The default value is true.
member.remarks: It decides whether the axis ticks will be rendered or not. If is true, the scale ticks will be rendered, otherwise not rendered.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.ShowLine
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show or hide the axis line.
member.value: true if axis line is displayed; otherwise, false.The default value is true.
member.remarks: It decides whether the axis line will be rendered or not. If is true, the axis line will be rendered, otherwise not rendered.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.ShowLabels
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show or hide the axis labels.
member.value: true if axis labels are displayed; otherwise, false.The default value is true.
member.remarks: It decides whether the axis labels will be rendered or not. If is true, the axis labels will be rendered, otherwise not rendered.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.EnableAxisAnimation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to animate the axis elements such as axis line, ticks, and labels on load time.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.EnableRangeAnimation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to animate linear range on load time.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.AnimationDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the load time animation duration in milliseconds.
member.remarks: It specifies how long the loading time animation will take.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.UseRangeColorForAxis
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use the range color for axis elements such as labels and ticks.
member.remarks: It decides whether the corresponding range color will be applied to the axis elements like labels and ticks or not. If is true, the corresponding range colors will be applied, otherwise not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.Orientation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether to show the linear gauge horizontally or vertically.
member.value: Orientation of the linear gauge. The default is GaugeOrientation.Horizontal".
member.remarks: Orientation decides whether the linear gauge will be rendered in horizontal or vertical direction.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.Ranges
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection to the linear gauge.
member.value: Customizes each range by adding it to the ranges collection. The default value is empty collection.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.BarPointers
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection to the linear gauge.
member.value: Customizes each pointer by adding it to the BarPointers collection. The default value is empty collection.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfLinearGauge.MarkerPointers
member.summary: Gets or sets the marker pointers collection to the linear gauge.
member.value: Customizes each pointer by adding it to the MarkerPointers collection. The default value is empty collection.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.GaugeAnnotation
member.summary: allows to add views such as text and image as an annotation to a specific point of interest in the radial gauge. provides options to add any image, text or other views over a gauge with respect to angle or axis value. Display the current progress or pointer value inside the gauge using a text annotation.

member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.summary: Holds radial axis instance.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.GaugeAnnotation.DirectionValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the value to adjusts the annotation distance from center. You can specify value either in axis value or angle using the property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.GaugeAnnotation.DirectionUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates the direction of annotation calculated based on axis value or angle.
member.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies the direction unit of annotation in the radial gauge. The default is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.GaugeAnnotation.PositionFactor
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the position of annotation in radius factor. PositionFactor value of 0 is starting from the center and 1 is ending at the edge of the radius.
member.example:
value of 0 is starting from the center and 1 is ending at the edge of the radius. must be between 0 to 1.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Annotations> <gauge:GaugeAnnotation DirectionValue="90" PositionFactor="0.5"> <gauge:GaugeAnnotation.Content> <Label Text="Syncfusion" TextColor="Black" /> </gauge:GaugeAnnotation.Content> </gauge:GaugeAnnotation> </gauge:RadialAxis.Annotations> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates the horizontal alignment of annotation.

member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates the vertical alignment of annotation.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.ContentPointer
member.summary: Represents the pointer that is used to indicate the value with any visual content.

example.code: <gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:ContentPointer Value="20" > <gauge:ContentPointer.Content> <Grid HeightRequest = "25" WidthRequest="25"> <Ellipse Fill = "Blue" /> <Label Text="{Binding Value}" TextColor="White" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center"/> </Grid> </gauge:ContentPointer.Content> </gauge:ContentPointer> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.ContentPointer.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the content of a .
member.value: An object that contains the pointer's visual content. The default value is null.

example.code: <gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:ContentPointer Value="20" > <gauge:ContentPointer.Content> <Grid HeightRequest = "25" WidthRequest="25"> <Ellipse Fill = "Blue" /> <Label Text="{Binding Value}" TextColor="White" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center"/> </Grid> </gauge:ContentPointer.Content> </gauge:ContentPointer> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.KnobRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the knob radius size.
member.value: It defines the radius of the knob either in pixel or factor. The default value is 0.07d.
member.example:
If is , value will be given from 0 to 1. Here knob radius size is calculated by * axis radius value. Example: value is 0.2 and axis radius is 100, knob radius is 20(0.2 * 100) logical pixels. if is , defined value is set to the knob radius.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:NeedlePointer Value="50" KnobRadius="0.08" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.KnobStrokeThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of the knob stroke outline.
member.value: It defines the thickness of the knob stroke. The default value is 0.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.KnobFill
member.summary: Gets or sets the Brush that paints the interior area of the knob.
member.value: A Brush that specifies how the knob is painted.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.KnobStroke
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the knob border color.
member.value: A Color that specifies how the knob border is painted.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.KnobSizeUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates to calculate the knob radius in logical pixel or radius factor.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies how the value is considered. The default mode is .

example.code: <gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:NeedlePointer Value="50" KnobRadius="0.02" KnobFill="Red" KnobStrokeThickness="2" KnobStroke="Blue" KnobSizeUnit="Factor" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.NeedleLength
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the length of the needle pointer. You can specify value either in logical pixel or radius factor using the property.
member.value: It defines the length of the needle either in pixel or factor. The default value is 0.75.
member.example:
If is , value will be given from 0 to 1. Here needle length is calculated by * axis radius value. Example: value is 0.2 and axis radius is 100, needle length is 20(0.2 * 100) logical pixels. if is , defined value is set to the needle length.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:NeedlePointer Value="50" NeedleLength="0.7" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.NeedleLengthUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies to calculate the needle pointer length either in logical pixel or radius factor.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies how the value is considered. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.NeedleStartWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the start width of the needle pointer.
member.value: It defines the width of the needle start. The default value is 2.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.NeedleEndWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the end width of the needle pointer.
member.value: It defines the width of the needle end. The default value is 8.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.NeedleFill
member.summary: Gets or sets the Brush that paints the interior area of the needle shape.
member.value: A Brush that specifies how the needle is painted.

example.code: <gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:NeedlePointer Value="50" NeedleLength="0.7" NeedleLengthUnit="Factor" NeedleStartWidth="10" NeedleEndWidth="10" NeedleFill="Red" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.TailLength
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the needle pointer tail length. You can specify value either in logical pixel or radius factor using the property.
member.value: It defines the tail length. The default value is 0.
member.example:
If is , value will be given from 0 to 1. Here tail length is calculated by * axis radius value. Example: value is 0.2 and axis radius is 100, tail length is 20(0.2 * 100) logical pixels. if is , defined value is set to the tail length.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:NeedlePointer Value="50" TailLength="0.2" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.TailFill
member.summary: Gets or sets the Brush that paints the interior area of the tail shape.
member.value: A Brush that specifies how the tail is painted.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.TailLengthUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies to calculate the needle pointer tail length either in logical pixel or radius factor.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies how the value is considered. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.NeedlePointer.TailWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the start width of the needle pointer's tail.
member.value: It defines the width of the tail. The default value is 8.

# [C#](#tab/tabid-2)
using Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges; ... private void MarkerPointer_ValueChanged(object sender, ValueChangedEventArgs e) { var value = e.Value; }

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialPointer.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the value of the pointer.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialPointer.StepFrequency
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the dragging step frequency of the pointer.

example.code: <gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:ShapePointer Value="50" IsInteractive="True" StepFrequency="10"/> <gauge:NeedlePointer Value="30" IsInteractive="True" StepFrequency="10" /> <gauge:RangePointer Value="80" IsInteractive="True" StepFrequency="10" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialPointer.EnableAnimation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether enables or disables the pointer animation.
member.value: true if animation is enabled; otherwise, false.The default value is false.
member.remarks: EnableAnimation decides whether the pointer will be animated or not while its value get changed. If EnableAnimation is true, then it will be animated, otherwise not.

example.code: <gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:ShapePointer Value="30" EnableAnimation="True" /> <gauge:NeedlePointer Value="30" EnableAnimation="True" /> <gauge:RangePointer Value="30" EnableAnimation="True" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialPointer.IsInteractive
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that allowing pointer value change through interaction.
member.value: true if pointer interaction is enabled; otherwise, false.The default value is false.
member.remarks: It decides whether the gauge pointer will be interactive or not. If is true, the gauge pointer will be interactive, otherwise not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialPointer.AnimationDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the pointer animation duration in milliseconds.
member.remarks: It specifies how long the pointer animation will take to reach from old value to new value.

example.code: <gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:ShapePointer EnableAnimation="True" AnimationDuration="1500" /> <gauge:NeedlePointer EnableAnimation="True" AnimationDuration="1500" /> <gauge:RangePointer EnableAnimation="True" AnimationDuration="1500" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialPointer.AnimationEasing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the pointer animation easing effect.
member.remarks: It specifies how long the pointer animation will take to reach from old value to new value.

example.code: <gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:ShapePointer EnableAnimation="True" AnimationEasing="BounceIn" /> <gauge:NeedlePointer EnableAnimation="True" AnimationEasing="BounceIn" /> <gauge:RangePointer EnableAnimation="True" AnimationEasing="BounceIn" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RangePointer.PointerWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the pointer width. You can specify value either in logical pixel or radius factor using the property.
member.value: It defines the width of the pointer. The default value is 10.
member.example:
If is , value will be given from 0 to 1. Here length size is calculated by * axis radius value. Example: value is 0.2 and axis radius is 100, length size is 20(0.2 * 100) logical pixels. if is , defined value is set to the length size.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:RangePointer Value="50" PointerWidth="0.2" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RangePointer.WidthUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates to calculate the range pointer width either in logical pixel or radius factor.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies how the value is considered. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RangePointer.PointerOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the position value for pointer. You can specify value either in logical pixel or radius factor using the property.
member.value: It defines the position offset of the pointer either pixel or factor. The default value is double.NaN.
member.example:
If is , value will be given from 0 to 1. Here pointer placing position is calculated by * axis radius value. Example: value is 0.2 and axis radius is 100, pointer is moving 20(0.2 * 100) logical pixels from axis outer radius. If is , defined value distance pointer will move from the outer radius axis. When you specify is negative, the pointer will be positioned outside the axis.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:RangePointer Value="50" PointerWidth="0.2" WidthUnit="Factor" PointerOffset="0.2" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RangePointer.OffsetUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates the to calculate the range pointer offset either in logical pixel or factor.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies how the value is considered. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RangePointer.CornerStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the corner style of range pointer.
member.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies the corner style of range pointer in the radial gauge. The default is .

example.code: <gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:RangePointer Value="50" PointerWidth="0.2" WidthUnit="Factor" PointerOffset="0.2" OffsetUnit="Factor" CornerStyle="BothCurve" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RangePointer.Fill
member.summary: Gets or sets the Color that paints the interior area of the range.
member.value: A Color that specifies how the range path is painted.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RangePointer.GradientStops
member.summary: Gets or sets a collection of to fill the gradient brush to the range pointer.
member.value: A collection of the objects associated with the brush, each of which specifies a color and an offset along the axis. The default is an empty collection.
member.example:
The below examples shows, how to add a collection of gradient stop to the range pointer.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:RangePointer Value="80" PointerWidth="0.2" WidthUnit="Factor" PointerOffset="0.2" OffsetUnit="Factor"> <gauge:RangePointer.GradientStops> <gauge:GaugeGradientStop Value="0" Color="Green" /> <gauge:GaugeGradientStop Value="50" Color="Yellow" /> <gauge:GaugeGradientStop Value="80" Color="Red" /> </gauge:RangePointer.GradientStops> </gauge:RangePointer> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis
member.summary: The is a circular arc in which a set of values are displayed along a linear or custom scale based on the design requirements.

example.code:
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis RadiusFactor="0.85" Interval="10" FontSize="14" Minimum="-60" Maximum="60">
<gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:NeedlePointer EnableAnimation="True" NeedleLengthUnit="Factor" NeedleLength="0.7" Value="9.94" NeedleStartWidth="2" NeedleEndWidth="10" KnobRadius="0.05" KnobSizeUnit="Factor" TailLength="0.1" TailWidth="10"> </gauge:NeedlePointer> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.example:
Create RadialAxis with the default or required scale range and customized axis properties.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis StartAngle = "130" EndAngle="50" IsInversed="False" RadiusFactor="0.9" CanRotateLabels="False" ShowLabels="True" ShowAxisLine="True" ShowTicks="True" ShowFirstLabel="True" ShowLastLabel="True" Minimum="0" Maximum="100" Interval="10" MinorTicksPerInterval="5" > </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.LabelCreated
member.summary: Called when an axis label is created

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.Minimum
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum value of the axis. The axis starts from this value.
member.value: It defines the minimum values of the . The default value is 0.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.Maximum
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum value of the axis. The axis ends at this value.
member.value: It defines the maximum value of the . The default value is 100.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.Interval
member.summary: Gets or sets the interval value of the axis. Using this, the axis labels can be displayed after a certain interval value.
member.value: It defines the interval of the . The default value is double.NaN.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.MinorTicksPerInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the interval of the minor ticks.
member.value: It defines number of minor ticks will be rendered between the major ticks. The default value is 1.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.MaximumLabelsCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of labels to be displayed in an axis in 100 logical pixels.
member.value: Maximum number of labels to be displayed in a axis in 100 logical pixels. Its default value is 3.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.StartAngle
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the of axis.
member.value: It defines the start angle of the axis. The default value is 130.
member.remarks: The picture below illustrates the direction of the angle from 0 degree to 360 degree.
member.example:
By setting the StartAngle, EndAngle and IsInversed, we can change the shape the radial gauge into full radial gauge, half radial gauge, and quarter radial gauge.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis StartAngle="130" /> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.EndAngle
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the of axis.
member.value: It defines the end angle of the axis. The default value is 50.
member.remarks: The picture below illustrates the direction of the angle from 0 degree to 360 degree.
member.example:
By setting the StartAngle, EndAngle and IsInversed, we can change the shape the radial gauge into full radial gauge, half radial gauge, and quarter radial gauge.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis EndAngle="50" /> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.RadiusFactor
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the radius of the . This value ranges from 0 to 1.
member.value: It defines the radius factor of the axis. The default value is 0.8.
member.example:
The size of the axis, expressed as the radius (half the diameter) in factor. The radiusFactor must be between 0 and 1. Axis radius is determined by multiplying this factor value to the minimum width or height of the control.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis RadiusFactor="0.9" /> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.CanScaleToFit
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to adjust the half or quarter gauge to fit the axis boundary. If true, the center and radius position of the axis will be modified on the basis of the angle value.
member.value: true if CanScaleToFit is enabled; otherwise, false.The default value is true.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.ShowTicks
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to shows or hides the axis tick lines.
member.value: true if axis line ticks are displayed; otherwise, false.The default value is true.
member.remarks: It decides whether the axis ticks will be rendered or not. If is true, the axis ticks will be rendered, otherwise not rendered.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.ShowAxisLine
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to shows or hides the axis line.
member.value: true if axis line is displayed; otherwise, false.The default value is true.
member.remarks: It decides whether the axis line will be rendered or not. If is true, the axis line will be rendered, otherwise not rendered.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.ShowLabels
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to shows or hides the axis labels.
member.value: true if axis labels are displayed; otherwise, false.The default value is true.
member.remarks: It decides whether the axis labels will be rendered or not. If is true, the axis labels will be rendered, otherwise not rendered.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.ShowFirstLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether shows or hides the first label of the axis
member.value: true if first label is displayed; otherwise, false. The default value is true.
member.example:
When startAngle and endAngle are the same, the first and last labels are intersected.To prevent this, enable this property to be false, if ShowLastLabel is true.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis ShowFirstLabel="False" /> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.ShowLastLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether shows or hides the last label of the axis.
member.value: true if last label is displayed; otherwise, false. The default value is true.
member.example:
When startAngle and endAngle are the same, the first and last labels are intersected.To prevent this, enable this property to be false, if ShowFirstLabel is true.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis ShowLastLabel="False" /> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.IsInversed
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether inverts the axis from right to left.
member.value: true if axis is inversed; otherwise, false.The default value is false.
member.remarks: IsInversed decides whether the axis will be inversed or not. If is true, the axis will be inversed, otherwise not inversed.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.CanRotateLabels
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to rotate the labels.
member.value: true if labels are rotated; otherwise, false. The default value is false.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.UseRangeColorForAxis
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use the range color for axis elements such as labels and ticks.
member.value: true if use range color is enabled; otherwise, false.The default value is false.
member.remarks: It decides whether the corresponding range color will be applied to the axis elements like labels and ticks or not. If is true, the corresponding range colors will be applied, otherwise not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.EnableLoadingAnimation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to animate radial axis each elements in load time.

example.code:
<gauge:SfRadialGauge > <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis EnableLoadingAnimation = "True" AnimationDuration="2000">
<gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialRange EndValue = "50" Label="Range"/> </gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:RangePointer Value = "30" PointerOffset="30"/> <gauge:NeedlePointer Value = "80" /> <gauge:ShapePointer Value = "60" />
</gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:RadialAxis.Annotations> <gauge:GaugeAnnotation DirectionValue = "90" DirectionUnit="Angle" PositionFactor="0.5"> <gauge:GaugeAnnotation.Content> <Label Text = "10" TextColor="Black"/> </gauge:GaugeAnnotation.Content> </gauge:GaugeAnnotation> </gauge:RadialAxis.Annotations> </gauge:RadialAxis>
</gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.AnimationDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the loading time animation duration in milliseconds.
member.remarks: It specifies how long the loading time radial axis elements animation will take.

example.code:
<gauge:SfRadialGauge > <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis EnableLoadingAnimation = "True" AnimationDuration="2000">
<gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialRange EndValue = "50" Label="Range"/> </gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:RangePointer Value = "30" PointerOffset="30"/> <gauge:NeedlePointer Value = "80" /> <gauge:ShapePointer Value = "60" />
</gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:RadialAxis.Annotations> <gauge:GaugeAnnotation DirectionValue = "90" DirectionUnit="Angle" PositionFactor="0.5"> <gauge:GaugeAnnotation.Content> <Label Text = "10" TextColor="Black"/> </gauge:GaugeAnnotation.Content> </gauge:GaugeAnnotation> </gauge:RadialAxis.Annotations> </gauge:RadialAxis>
</gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.TickPosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates the position of the ticks inside, center, or outside the axis line.
member.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies the position of ticks in the radial gauge. The default is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.TickOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the value to adjusts the axis ticks position from the axis lines. You can specify value either in logical pixel or radius factor using the property.
member.value: It defines the offset of the ticks. The default value is double.NaN.
member.example:
If offsetUnit is GaugeSizeUnit.factor, value will be given from 0 to 1. Here ticks placing position is calculated by TickOffset * axis outer radius value. Example: TickOffset value is 0.2 and axis radius is 100, ticks moving 20(0.2 * 100) logical pixels from axis line outer end. If offsetUnit is GaugeSizeUnit.logicalPixel, the defined value distance ticks will move from the outer end of the axis.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis TickOffset="30" /> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.LabelPosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates the position of the axis labels inside or outside the axis line.
member.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies the position of labels in the radial gauge. The registered default is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.LabelOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets a value to adjusts the axis label position from tick end. You can specify value either in logical pixel or radius factor using the property.
member.value: It defines the offset of the axis labels. The default value is double.NaN.
member.example:
If offsetUnit is GaugeSizeUnit.factor, value will be given from 0 to 1. Here labels placing position is calculated by LabelOffset * axis outer radius value. Example: labelOffset value is 0.2 and axis radius is 100, labels moving 20(0.2 * 100) logical pixels from axis line outer end. If offsetUnit is GaugeSizeUnit.logicalPixel, the defined value distance labels will move from the outer end of the axis.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis LabelOffset="30" /> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.OffsetUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates to calculate the labels and ticks offset either in logical pixel or factor.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies how the and values are considered. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.LabelFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets a value to formats the axis labels with globalized string formats.
member.value: The string that specifies the globalized string formats for the axis labels. Its default value is string.Empty.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.MajorTickStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets , that used to customize major ticks.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.MinorTickStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets , that used to customize minor ticks.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.AxisLabelStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets , that used to customize gauge axis labels.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.AxisLineStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets a value to customize the axis line.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.BackgroundContent
member.summary: Gets or sets a image to set in axis background.

example.code: <gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis RadiusFactor="1" StartAngle="0" EndAngle="360" ShowAxisLine="False" CanRotateLabels="True" TickOffset="0.32" OffsetUnit="Factor" LabelOffset="0.05" Maximum="360" Minimum="0" Interval="30" MinorTicksPerInterval="4"> <gauge:RadialAxis.BackgroundContent> <Image Source="axisbackground.png" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.BackgroundContent> <gauge:RadialAxis.AxisLabelStyle> <gauge:GaugeLabelStyle TextColor="White" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.AxisLabelStyle> <gauge:RadialAxis.MajorTickStyle> <gauge:RadialTickStyle LengthUnit="Factor" Length="0.087"/> </gauge:RadialAxis.MajorTickStyle> <gauge:RadialAxis.MinorTickStyle> <gauge:RadialTickStyle LengthUnit= Factor" Length="0.058"/> </gauge:RadialAxis.MinorTickStyle> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.Ranges
member.summary: Gets or sets a collection of to the axis.
member.value: The collection of linear range to display the current value of the axis. The default value is empty collection.
member.example:
The below examples shows, how to add a collection of gauge range to the radial axis and customize each range by adding it to the ranges collection.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="0" EndValue="35" Fill="Green" /> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="35" EndValue="70" Fill="Orange" /> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="70" EndValue="100" Fill="Red" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.Pointers
member.summary: Gets or sets a collection of to the axis.
member.value: The collection of linear range to display the current value of the axis. The default value is empty collection.
member.example:
The below examples shows, how to add a collection of gauge pointer to the radial axis and customize each pointer by adding it to the pointers collection.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:ShapePointer Value="50" /> <gauge:NeedlePointer Value="60" /> <gauge:RangePointer Value="70"/> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialAxis.Annotations
member.summary: Gets or sets a collection of to the axis.
member.value: The collection of to display the specific point of interest in the radial gauge. The default value is empty collection.
member.example:
The below examples shows, how to add a collection of annotation to the radial axis and customize each annotation by adding it to the annotation collection.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Annotations> <gauge:GaugeAnnotation DirectionUnit="Angle" DirectionValue="90" PositionFactor="0.6"> <gauge:GaugeAnnotation.Content> <Label Text="GaugeAnnotation" TextColor="Black" /> </gauge:GaugeAnnotation.Content> </gauge:GaugeAnnotation> </gauge:RadialAxis.Annotations> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialRange
member.summary: Create the range to add color bar in the gauge. is a visual that helps to quickly visualize where a value falls on the axis.

example.code: <gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="0" EndValue="35" Fill="Red" /> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="35" EndValue="75" Fill="Yellow"/> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="75" EndValue="100" Fill="Green"/> </gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialRange.StartValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the range start value.
member.value: It defines the start value of the range. The default value is 0.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialRange.EndValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the range end value.
member.value: It defines the end value of the range. The default value is 0.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialRange.RangeOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the range position. You can specify value either in logical pixel or radius factor using the property.
member.value: It defines offset of the range either in pixel or factor. The default value is double.NaN.
member.example:
If is , value will be given from 0 to 1. Here range placing position is calculated by * axis radius value. Example: value is 0.2 and axis radius is 100, range is moving 20(0.2 * 100) logical pixels from axis outer radius. If is , the given value distance range moves from the outer radius axis. When you specify is negative, the range will be positioned outside the axis.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="50" EndValue="100" RangeOffset="10" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialRange.OffsetUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates the to calculate the range offset either in logical pixel or factor.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies how the value is considered. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialRange.WidthUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates the whether range start and end width can be calculated using logical pixel or radius factor.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies how the and values are considered. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialRange.StartWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the range start width. You can specify value either in logical pixel or radius factor using the property.
member.value: It defines the start width of the range. The default value is 10.
member.example:
If is , value must be given from 0 to 1. Here range start width is calculated by * axis radius value. Example: value is 0.2 and axis radius is 100, range start width is 20(0.2 * 100) logical pixels. if is , the defined value is set for the start width of the range.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="50" EndValue="100" RangeOffset="10" OffsetUnit="Factor" StartWidth="10"/> </gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialRange.EndWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the range end width. You can specify value either in logical pixel or radius factor using the property.
member.value: It defines the end width of the range. The default value is 10.
member.example:
If is , value must be given from 0 to 1. Here range start width is calculated by * axis radius value. Example: value is 0.2 and axis radius is 100, range start width is 20(0.2 * 100) logical pixels. if is , the defined value is set for the end width of the range.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="50" EndValue="100" RangeOffset="10" OffsetUnit="Factor" StartWidth="10"/> </gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialRange.Label
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the text for range.
member.value: It defines the string for the range label. The default value is null.

example.code: <gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis ShowTicks="False" ShowLabels="False"> <gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="0" EndValue="30" StartWidth="0.5" EndWidth="0.5" WidthUnit="Factor" Fill="Red" Label="Slow" /> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="30" EndValue="70" StartWidth="0.5" EndWidth="0.5" WidthUnit="Factor" Fill="Yellow" Label="Moderate" /> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="70" EndValue="100" StartWidth="0.5" EndWidth="0.5" WidthUnit="Factor" Fill="Green" Label="Fast" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialRange.LabelStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets , that helps to customize label in range.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialRange.Fill
member.summary: Gets or sets the Color that paints the interior area of the range.
member.value: A Color that specifies how the range is painted.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.RadialRange.GradientStops
member.summary: Gets or sets a collection of to fill the gradient brush to the gauge range.
member.value: A collection of the objects associated with the brush, each of which specifies a color and an offset along the axis. The default is an empty collection.
member.example:
The below examples shows, how to add a collection of gradient stop to the gauge range.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="0" EndValue="100"> <gauge:RadialRange.GradientStops> <gauge:GaugeGradientStop Value="0" Color="Green" /> <gauge:GaugeGradientStop Value= "50" Color="Yellow" /> <gauge:GaugeGradientStop Value="100" Color="Red" /> </gauge:RadialRange.GradientStops> </gauge:RadialRange> </gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfRadialGauge
member.summary: Represents a radial gauge control that is used to displays numerical values on a circular scale. It has a rich set of features such as axes, ranges, pointers, and annotations that are fully customizable and extendable. Use it to create speedometers, temperature monitors, dashboards, meter gauges, multi axis clocks, watches, activity gauges, compasses, and more.
member.example:
The below examples shows, how to initialize the radial gauge.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:NeedlePointer x:Name="pointer" Value="60"/> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialRange StartValue="0" EndValue="100"> <gauge:RadialRange.GradientStops> <gauge:GaugeGradientStop Value="0" Color="Green" /> <gauge:GaugeGradientStop Value="50" Color="Orange" /> <gauge:GaugeGradientStop Value="100" Color="Red" /> </gauge:RadialRange.GradientStops> </gauge:RadialRange> </gauge:RadialAxis.Ranges> <gauge:RadialAxis.Annotations> <gauge:GaugeAnnotation DirectionUnit="Angle" DirectionValue="90" PositionFactor="0.7" > <gauge:GaugeAnnotation.Content> <Label Text="{Binding Source={x:Reference pointer},Path=Value}" /> </gauge:GaugeAnnotation.Content> </gauge:GaugeAnnotation> </gauge:RadialAxis.Annotations> </gauge:RadialAxis> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfRadialGauge.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.example:
The below examples shows, how to creates a radial gauge with required axis.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis /> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Gauges.SfRadialGauge.Axes
member.summary: Gets or sets a collection of .
member.value: The collection of axes to display multiple axis. The default value is empty collection.
member.example:
The below examples shows, how to add a collection of radial axis to the gauge and customize each axis by adding it to the axes collection.
<gauge:SfRadialGauge> <gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> <gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> <gauge:NeedlePointer Value="60" /> </gauge:RadialAxis.Pointers> </gauge:RadialAxis> <gauge:RadialAxis RadiusFactor="0.5" /> </gauge:SfRadialGauge.Axes> </gauge:SfRadialGauge>
